surface: Complete: `setupRouterSsrQueryIntegration` (the package's only export) delegating to `@tanstack/router-ssr-query-core@1.169.1`, with the QueryClientProvider Wrap composition on Octane.
ssr: Supported — this package IS the SSR integration (dehydrates query state into the router stream and wraps the app in the query provider).
notes: Created for the tanstack-com benchmark's octane flavor (Phase 2c); exercised end-to-end by that app's SSR + hydration.
